question: The teacher asked the students _____ their homework carefully.
explanation: ask sb. to do sth. 结构中，不定式作宾语补足语。

question: If it _____ tomorrow, we will stay at home.
explanation: 条件状语从句中用一般现在时表将来。

question: She has lived in Beijing _____ 2010.
explanation: since 后接时间点，for 后接时间段。2010是时间点，故用since。

question: The book _____ on the desk is mine.
explanation: 现在分词作后置定语，修饰 the book。lie 的现在分词是 lying。

question: Neither the teacher nor the students _____ happy.
explanation: neither...nor... 遵循就近原则，students 为复数，故用 are。

question: I would appreciate _____ if you could help me.
explanation: appreciate it if... 是固定结构，it 作形式宾语。

question: The man _____ leg was broken is a famous athlete.
explanation: 定语从句中 whose 指代 the man，与 leg 是所属关系。

question: _____ it is raining heavily, we still went out.
explanation: although 引导让步状语从句，表示“虽然…仍然…”。

question: He has finished the work _____.
explanation: already 用于肯定句中，表示“已经”。

question: The building _____ last year looks beautiful.
explanation: 过去分词 built 作后置定语，相当于 which was built。

question: _____ of the students passed the exam.
explanation: 分数表达：分子用基数词，分母用序数词，三分之二即 two thirds。

question: It is necessary that everyone _____ the rules.
explanation: 在 It is necessary that... 结构中，从句用虚拟语气，谓语用一般现在时。

question: The movie is worth _____ again.
explanation: be worth doing 是固定结构，表示“值得做…”。

question: She looks sad. Something must have _____.
explanation: go wrong 意为“出错、出问题”，符合语境。

question: He had no sooner arrived _____ he wanted to leave.
explanation: no sooner...than... 是固定搭配，表示“一…就…”。

question: I suggest that he _____ the meeting right now.
explanation: suggest 后接宾语从句，从句用虚拟语气，谓语用 (should) + 动词原形。

question: The boy is too young to _____ himself.
explanation: dress oneself 表示“给自己穿衣服”，符合句意。

question: I haven't seen her _____ three years ago.
explanation: since 后接时间点（three years ago），与现在完成时连用。

question: The reason _____ he was late is that he missed the bus.
explanation: the reason why... 是固定结构，why 引导定语从句。

question: She speaks English _____ her mother does.
explanation: as well as 意为“和…一样好”，用于肯定句比较。

question: The room needs _____, but we plan to wait until next year.
explanation: need doing = need to be done，表示“需要被…”。

question: I would have helped you _____ you told me.
explanation: 虚拟语气结构：would have done if + 过去完成时。

question: He asked me where I _____.
explanation: 宾语从句的时态与主句呼应，主句为一般过去时，从句用过去相应时态。

question: _____ the work, he went home.
explanation: 现在分词完成式作状语，表示动作在谓语之前发生。

question: It was at the school _____ I studied hard.
explanation: 强调句结构：It is/was + 强调部分 + that/who + 其余部分。

question: I have never seen _____ film before.
explanation: such + a/an + adj. + n. = so + adj. + a/an + n.，film 是单数可数名词。

question: The boy would have died _____ the doctor's arrival.
explanation: but for 意为“要不是”，与虚拟语气连用。

question: She has a gift for _____ languages.
explanation: have a gift for doing sth. 是固定搭配，意为“有做…的天赋”。

question: The teacher said that light _____ faster than sound.
explanation: 客观真理和科学事实用在宾语从句中时，任何时态都不变。

question: I would rather you _____ tomorrow.
explanation: would rather 后接宾语从句，用虚拟语气，谓语用一般过去时。

question: The old man has three sons, _____ is a doctor.
explanation: one of whom 引导非限制性定语从句，whom 指代 sons。

question: It's time we _____ something to protect the environment.
explanation: It's time (that) sb. did sth. 是虚拟语气结构，意为“该做…了”。

question: He got up early _____ he could catch the first bus.
explanation: in order that 和 so that 都可引导目的状语从句，意为“以便、为了”。

question: The weather in Beijing is different from _____ in Guangzhou.
explanation: that 替代前面出现的单数名词 the weather，避免重复。

question: She had hardly sat down _____ the phone rang.
explanation: hardly...when... 意为“一…就…”，hardly 后的主句用过去完成时。

question: The book is _____ of the two.
explanation: 两者之间比较用比较级，且前有定冠词 the。

question: He was about to leave _____ the doorbell rang.
explanation: be about to do...when... 意为“正要…这时…”。

question: _____ the day went on, the weather got worse.
explanation: as 引导时间状语从句，意为“随着”。with 后不接从句。

question: I have no idea _____.
explanation: idea 后接同位语从句，从句用陈述语序，且表示将来用 will come。

question: She is the only one of the girls who _____ the piano well.
explanation: the only one of...who... 定语从句修饰 one，谓语用单数。

question: The man insisted that he _____ nothing wrong.
explanation: insist 表示“坚持说（某事属实）”时，用陈述语气；从句动作先于主句，用过去完成时。

question: The teacher told us that light _____ in straight lines.
explanation: 宾语从句中客观真理用一般现在时，不受主句时态影响。

question: _____ the truth, he would not have believed you.
explanation: 倒装虚拟语气，相当于 If he had known the truth，省略 if 用 Had he known。

question: _____ beautiful the flower is!
explanation: how 引导的感叹句结构：How + adj./adv. + 主谓！

question: I remember _____ her somewhere before.
explanation: remember doing sth. 表示“记得做过某事”；remember to do sth. 表示“记得要去做”。

question: The girl _____ by the window is my sister.
explanation: 现在分词 sitting 作后置定语，相当于 who is sitting。

question: He asked me if I knew whose car _____.
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，且 whose 限定 car，从句主语为 this。

question: _____ the project, they decided to have a celebration.
explanation: Having completed 作状语，表示动作在谓语之前已完成。

question: We should keep the window _____.
explanation: keep + n. + adj. 结构，open 作宾语补足语，表示保持某种状态。

question: It is no use _____ over spilt milk.
explanation: It is no use doing sth. 是固定结构，意为“做…是无用的”。

question: She has difficulty in learning _____, which is very popular nowadays.
explanation: AI（人工智能）是缩略词，作不可数名词用，不加冠词也不变复数。

question: This is the very book _____ I lost yesterday.
explanation: 当先行词被 the very, the only, the same 等修饰时，关系代词用 that。

question: He acted as if he _____ everything in the world.
explanation: as if 引导的状语从句用虚拟语气，与现在事实相反用一般过去时。

question: The children were excited _____ the cartoon.
explanation: be excited to do sth. 意为“很兴奋去做某事”。

question: The teacher asked the new student _____.
explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，且主句为一般过去时，从句用过去相应时态。

question: It is reported that the president _____ Beijing tomorrow.
explanation: It is reported that... 宾语从句表示将来，用一般将来时。

question: He ran too quickly for us _____.
explanation: too...to... 结构中，不定式 to catch 作结果状语。

question: _____ is known to all, China is a developing country.
explanation: as 引导非限制性定语从句，指代后面整个句子，可位于句首。

question: I would appreciate _____ very much if you could give me a hand.
explanation: appreciate it if/when... 是固定结构，it 作形式宾语。

question: He made up his mind to work harder to _____ the lost time.
explanation: make up for 意为“弥补”，符合句意。

question: The student denied _____ the book from the library.
explanation: deny doing sth. 意为“否认做过某事”。动名词的完成式 having taken 表示动作已发生。

question: We must study hard _____ we can serve our country better.
explanation: in order that 引导目的状语从句，意为“为了、以便”。

question: The concert was _____ success.
explanation: success 作可数名词用，意为“一次成功的事”，前加 a。

question: He has difficulty _____ the problem.
explanation: have difficulty (in) doing sth. 结构，in 可省略。

question: The book _____ on the shelf is very interesting.
explanation: lying 是 lie 的现在分词，作后置定语，相当于 which is lying。

question: If I _____ you, I would take this job.
explanation: 与现在事实相反的虚拟语气条件句，谓语用一般过去时，be 动词用 were。

question: He is not such a man _____ would tell a lie.
explanation: such...as... 是固定搭配，as 引导定语从句。

question: My parents insisted that I _____ at home.
explanation: insist 表示“坚持要求”时，从句用虚拟语气 should + 动词原形，should 可省略。

question: The boy spent the whole morning _____ the puzzle.
explanation: work on 意为“从事、致力于”；work out 意为“计算出、解出”。

question: I would rather you _____ the plan.
explanation: would rather 后接宾语从句，用一般过去时表示虚拟。

question: He walked into the room without _____.
explanation: without 为介词，后接动名词被动式 being noticed。

question: He is said _____ abroad, but I don't know which country he studied in.
explanation: be said to have done 表示“据说做过某事”，动作已发生，用不定式完成式。

question: The reason for his absence was _____ he was ill.
explanation: the reason 后接 that 引导的表语从句，because 用于回答 why。

question: _____ for your help, I wouldn't have passed the exam.
explanation: Had it not been = If it had not been，与虚拟语气连用。

question: It is essential that everyone _____ the meeting on time.
explanation: It is essential that... 从句用虚拟语气，谓语用 (should) + 动词原形。

question: The police found the missing child _____ under a tree.
explanation: find + 宾语 + 现在分词 sleeping，表示“发现…正在…”。

question: He went to the party _____ his teacher's advice.
explanation: against one's advice 意为“违背某人的建议”。

question: He broke the window and was made _____ it.
explanation: make 为使役动词，用于被动语态时，后面的不定式 to 不能省略。

question: I have no money and _____ books.
explanation: neither/nor + 助动词 + 主语，表示“…也不”，倒装结构。

question: He is the only one of the students who _____ elected.
explanation: the only one of... 修饰 one，从句谓语用单数；elect 与 students 为动宾关系，用被动语态。

question: The doctor suggested that he _____ smoking.
explanation: suggest 表示“建议”时，从句用虚拟语气 (should) + 动词原形。give up 意为“戒烟”。

question: The little girl is too shy to _____ in public.
explanation: speak up 意为“大声说、在公开场合发言”。

question: She regrets _____ you that your application has been rejected.
explanation: regret to do sth. 表示“为即将做的事感到遗憾”；regret doing sth. 表示“为已做的事感到后悔”。

question: I saw him _____ the road when I passed by.
explanation: see 为感官动词，接不带 to 的不定式作宾补，表示看到整个动作。

question: The teacher walked into the classroom, _____ by his students.
explanation: 过去分词 followed 作伴随状语，表示被动含义：被学生跟随。

question: He is not fond of _____ music.
explanation: music 为不可数名词，其前的修饰语 classical 不加冠词。

question: I used to _____ a lot of coffee when I was young.
explanation: used to do 表示“过去常常做…”，to 后接动词原形。

question: The book _____ on this subject is worth reading.
explanation: 过去分词 written 作后置定语，相当于 which is written。

question: He didn't come to class, _____ made the teacher angry.
explanation: which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面整个句子。

question: _____ the exam, he went to the library.
explanation: Having finished 作时间状语，表示“完成考试后”，动作在谓语之前发生。

question: It is said that he _____ the novel into English already.
explanation: already 常与现在完成时连用，表示“已经”。

question: He acted as if he _____ the champion.
explanation: as if 引导的状语从句用虚拟语气；与当时情况相符可用一般过去时。

question: The teacher told the students to stop _____ and listen to him.
explanation: stop doing sth. 表示“停止做某事”；stop to do sth. 表示“停下来去做另一件事”。

question: _____ the day went on, the weather got worse.
explanation: as 引导时间状语从句，意为“随着”。

question: He had no sooner arrived home _____ he was called out again.
explanation: no sooner...than... 意为“一…就…”。

question: The boy is young _____ to carry the box.
explanation: adj./adv. + enough + to do sth. 表示“足够…可以…”。

question: I have never seen _____ film.
explanation: such + a/an + adj. + 单数可数名词 = so + adj. + a/an + 单数可数名词。

question: The man _____ was our English teacher.
explanation: whom 引导定语从句，在从句中作 talked to 的宾语。

question: He was angry at _____ nothing.
explanation: at 为介词，后接动名词；ask 与主语为动宾关系，用被动式 being asked。

question: Reading is _____ to my life.
explanation: of great importance = very important，是固定表达。
